content_body: Our group of three loved the house, and the location was perfect. The house was well equipped with everything that we needed, and we appreciated the super comfortable beds. We discovered the wonderful Ponce City Market, which was a short walk away. This was our first trip to Atlanta, and we debated renting a car. We tried Uber and were very happy with our choice. We never had to wait for more than 5 minutes from this area. Thank you so much for sharing this wonderful home. We'll be back next year!
title: Great house and even better location
